title: Volumetric
description: A simple resource pack that makes your items 3D
body:
Join the [**Discord server**](https://discord.gg/9Ae2ZfkYGr) to **report issues** and get **announcements**!
Volumetric is a resource pack that aims to enhance your Minecraft experience by giving each item a unique 3D model. Volumetric adds a new level of detail to your world, while staying true to visual style of the game we all know and love.
**⭐Features** - 3D item models - Custom textures **🌱Progress** - The project is still in the works, and will take some time before it's completed. You can view the progress of the project below. ![bar that shows how much of the pack is finished](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/667e7c8af5873e81204779533138810686ea735a.png) **⚙️Compatibility** - This pack, unfortunately, might not be fully compatible with other resource packs. The good news is that you can create an addon to increase it's compatibility!
**📃Usage terms** You can ✅: - Use this pack for content creation (showcasing on youtube, using in streams, etc.) as long as you link back to this page. - Create addons for this pack. - Distribute modified versions of this pack. (changes must be significantly different from the original pack) - Use this pack in modpacks. You cannot ❌: - Distribute unmodified versions of this pack. - Claim ownership over any of the assets in this pack. - Upload this pack to other websites as me/on my behalf. Recommended ⭐: - Download from this page to ensure a safe download and get the latest versions.
